e.p: Is your food good?
Oh, I am sorry. Is it cold?
What do you want to eat?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một món ăn nóng.

e.p: Okay. I can make new food for you. Is that okay?
Here is your new food. Is it good now?
e.m: Nói đồ ăn bây giờ rất ngon.
e.s: Yes, it is very good now.

e.p: Hello! How is your room?
Oh, I am sorry. What is not clean?
I can send help. Do you want a new bed?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một cái giường mới.
e.s: Yes, I want a new bed.

e.p: Okay, a worker comes now. Is your room big?
Okay. We can clean the room. Or you can have a new room. What do you want?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một phòng mới.

e.p: Here is your coffee. Is it good?
e.m: Nói đây không phải cà phê của bạn.
e.s: No, this is not my coffee.

e.p: Oh, I am sorry. What drink do you want?
Okay. I can bring tea. Is this table clean?
e.s: No, this table is not clean.

e.p: I can clean it. And your tea comes now. Do you like this place?
e.m: Nói bạn không thích nơi này.
e.s: No, I don't like this place.

e.p: I am sorry. Your tea is free. Is that good?
e.m: Nói bạn thích trà miễn phí.

e.p: Your new book is here. Is it good?
Oh, I am sorry. Is it broken?
What do you want? A new book?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một cuốn sách mới.

e.p: We can send a new book to your house. Is your house far?
e.s: No, my house is not far.

e.p: Okay. The new book comes tomorrow. Is that fast?
Your soup is cold. What do you want?
Okay. I can bring hot soup. Is your glass empty?
I can bring water. Or do you want juice?
Is your table big enough for more food?
e.s: Yes, the table is big enough.

e.p: Here is your hot soup and water. Is everything good now?
Hello. What is the problem?
e.m: Nói TV của bạn không hoạt động.

e.p: I see. Can I come to your room?
Is your room number [studentRoomNumber]?
e.m: Nói số phòng của bạn là [studentRoomNumber].

e.p: Okay. I am coming now. Is your door open?
I fix the TV. It works now. Is that good?

d.t: Phàn nàn về sự chờ đợi

e.p: Hello! Is your table ready?
Oh, I am sorry. How many people are you?
Okay, your table is ready now. Is it a good table?
I can find a big table for you. Do you like window view?
e.m: Nói bạn thích nhìn ra cửa sổ.

e.p: Okay, a big table with window view is ready. Is that good?
Excuse me. My coffee is cold.
Can I have a hot coffee?
e.m: Nói bạn có thể mang cà phê nóng.
e.s: Yes, I can bring hot coffee.

e.p: My table is also dirty.
Is this place quiet?
e.m: Nói không, nơi này ồn ào.

e.p: Okay, I am sorry for the noise. Your coffee and table are good now. Is that correct?

d.t: Đề nghị giải pháp đơn giản

e.p: My internet is very slow.
e.m: Hỏi anh ấy có muốn internet tốt không.

e.p: Yes, I want good internet. My room is hot.
e.m: Hỏi anh ấy có muốn một phòng mới không.
e.s: Do you want a new room?

e.p: Maybe. Is the new room big?
e.s: Yes, the new room is big.

e.p: And is the new room clean?
e.s: Yes, the new room is clean.

e.p: Okay, I want the new room. Is it far from here?
Your clothes are not clean. We can wash them again. Is that okay?
And we give you a free drink. Do you like it?
e.m: Nói bạn thích đồ uống miễn phí.

e.p: Your clothes will be ready in one hour. Is that okay?
e.m: Nói bạn chấp nhận thời gian đó.
e.h: Yes, that is okay. / That is fine.
e.s: Yes, that is okay. Thank you.

e.p: Do you need anything else from us?
e.m: Nói không cần thêm gì và bạn hài lòng.
e.h: Dùng 'No, thank you. I am satisfied.'
e.s: No, thank you. I am satisfied.

e.p: Thank you! Have a good day.

d.t: Từ chối và yêu cầu khác

e.p: Your order is late. We can give you free coffee. Is that okay?
e.m: Nói không, bạn muốn một bữa ăn miễn phí.

e.p: Oh, free food? Why do you want free food?
e.m: Nói đồ ăn của bạn rất muộn.

e.p: I see. We can give you a discount on your next meal. Is that good?
e.m: Nói không, bạn muốn đồ ăn miễn phí bây giờ.
e.h: No. I want + Adj + N + now.
e.s: No. I want free food now.

e.p: Okay, we can do free food this time. Do you like pizza?
Great! Free pizza for you. Is that good now?
My light is broken in the room.
e.m: Nói bạn có thể sửa đèn.

e.p: When can you fix it?
e.m: Nói bạn có thể sửa nó bây giờ.

e.p: Okay. My window is also not clean.
e.m: Hỏi bạn có muốn cửa sổ sạch không.

e.p: Yes, I want a clean window. Thank you.
My light works and the window is clean. Is everything good now?
e.m: Xác nhận mọi thứ đều tốt.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xử lý vấn đề ở nhà hàng

e.p: Your food is here. Is it good?
Oh, I am sorry. What do you want?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một món ăn nóng khác.

e.p: We can make it. Is your drink good?
e.m: Nói đồ uống của bạn sai.

e.p: I am sorry. What drink do you want?
Okay. Hot food and orange juice are coming. Is everything okay now?

d.t: Ôn tập: Giải quyết sự cố mua sắm

e.p: This shirt is for you. Do you like it?
e.m: Nói bạn không thích màu này.
e.s: No, I don't like this color.

e.p: Oh, what color do you like?
Okay, we have a blue shirt. Is it big enough?
I am sorry. We have a big blue shirt. Do you want it?
Good. The big blue shirt is free for you. Is that good?

d.t: Ôn tập: Hỗ trợ khách hàng tại khách sạn

e.p: Hello. What is the problem today?
e.m: Nói điều hòa không hoạt động.

e.p: I am sorry. I can fix it now. Is your room number [studentRoomNumber]?
e.m: Xác nhận số phòng của bạn là [studentRoomNumber].
e.h: Yes, my room number + be + N.

e.p: And is your lamp okay?
e.m: Nói đèn của bạn bị hỏng.

e.p: Okay, I fix AC and lamp. Is your bed soft?
Oh, I am sorry. We can change your bed. Or we can give you a new room. What do you want?
e.m: Nói bạn muốn một phòng mới.
